texto: I get the sense that some people think that influence dilutes – that the more you are someone else, the less you are yourself, as if you were born with some innate distinct youness that is gradually sanded away by the corroding forces of conformity. That if you could somehow tune everything else out and really dig deep within yourself, you’d find your voice there, pure and independent.That’s bullshit. Your voice isn’t there, already made. You need to make your own voice. You need to make your own voice.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Raphael Bob-Waksberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I get the sense that some people think that influence dilutes – that the more you are someone els…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, art, artist pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e artist.

frase_original: I get the sense that some people think that influence dilutes – that the more you are someone else, the less you are yourself, as if you were born with some innate distinct youness that is gradually sanded away by the corroding forces of conformity. That if you could somehow tune everything else out and really dig deep within yourself, you’d find your voice there, pure and independent.That’s bullshit. Your voice isn’t there, already made. You need to make your own voice. You need to make your own voice.

texto: For so many families, here and abroad, the war is just beginning. The emotional and political fallout will crawl across generations—the casualties can never be fully counted.Every war, no matter how brutal, is built on the premise that one day, when all is said and done, the ends will justify the means. But over and over again we learn that in real life, there is no ends. There’s just the means. All there is is means.
explicacao: Citação de Raphael Bob-Waksberg sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “For so many families, here and abroad, the war is just beginning. The emotional and political fal…” articula sabedoria, killing, paz em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como termino e viagem.
